PersonaImport.followUpInterviewDescription: Conduct in-depth supplementary interview based on analysis results

personaImportClient.title: Persona Management
personaImportClient.subtitle: Import interview records, analyze completeness, and generate interactive personas for your research and analysis needs.
personaImportClient.importDescription: Upload PDF interview records and convert them to structured, LLM-compatible format
personaImportClient.chatDescription: Interact with generated personas based on your interview data
personaImportClient.researchDescription: Advanced research tools and analytics powered by persona data
personaImportClient.dimensionsDescription: Our system evaluates interview completeness across four key socio-psychological dimensions
personaImportClient.demographicDescription: Social identity and growth trajectory analysis including age, education, occupation, and background.
personaImportClient.psychologicalDescription: Personality traits, emotional patterns, and internal motivations reflected in behavior.
personaImportClient.behavioralDescription: Consumer behavior, decision preferences, and social influence patterns.
personaImportClient.politicalDescription: Cultural stance, information trust structures, and community belonging analysis.
personaImportClient.gettingStartedDescription: Follow these simple steps to create your first persona
personaImportClient.step1Description: Start by uploading a PDF containing your interview transcripts or records.
personaImportClient.step2Description: Examine the completeness scores and identify areas that need additional information.
personaImportClient.step3Description: Create an interactive persona and start chatting with it to validate insights.
personaImportClient.step4Description: Deploy personas in advanced research scenarios and analytics workflows.
personaImportClient.uploadFileFirst: Please upload a PDF file first

personas.title: My Personas
personas.subtitle: Manage and interact with your generated personas
personas.createNewPersonas: Create new personas from interview data

personaChat.confirmClearHistory: Are you sure you want to clear all chat history? This action cannot be undone.
personaChat.clearFailed: Failed to clear history, please try again

followUpInterview.thankYou: Thank you for participating in this interview session. Your responses have been recorded and will be used for research purposes.
followUpInterview.summaryNote: The interview summary and analysis will be available to the researcher shortly.

import.title: AI Persona Generation
import.processingError: An error occurred while processing the file:
import.progressDescription: AI is analyzing your interview content and generating personas
import.confirmReanalyze: Are you sure you want to re-analyze? This will overwrite existing analysis results.

analysisResult.title: Completeness Analysis Results
analysisResult.description: Structured analysis and scoring based on four major socio-psychological dimensions, assessing information completeness
analysisResult.excellentCoverage: Excellent coverage across dimensions, comprehensive and in-depth information
analysisResult.goodCoverage: Good coverage, some dimensions can be further optimized
analysisResult.baselineCoverage: Coverage meets baseline, key information needs to be supplemented
analysisResult.belowBaseline: Coverage below baseline, extensive supplementation needed across dimensions

personaSummary.title: Generated User Personas
personaSummary.description: AI conversation characters generated based on content

supplementaryQuestions.title: Comprehensive Supplementary Questions
supplementaryQuestions.description: Recommended questions generated based on analysis results to improve persona completeness
supplementaryQuestions.shareDescription: Send this link to interviewees to collect answers to supplementary questions
supplementaryQuestions.shareNote: Interviewees can view questions and provide answers through this link
supplementaryQuestions.createShareNote: Create a link to send to interviewees for collecting supplementary answers
